title: KillerCODE SMP
description: A official Modpack for the server Killer code SMP made by the Youtuber KillerCode2267
body:
Info about the Modpack, and more

This is a modpack use by the youtuber called Killercode2267 this modpack is use for his server which is Killercode SMP this add maily voice chat to talkto others, and mods that will help the server.

This pack includes some peformace mods, and voice chat Mod.

it really dosn't have that many mods in it.

the peformace mods should make your game run smoother and the simple voice chat will allow you to use your mic in game chat this makes it where you dont need things like discord or other things to talk like talking sites. instead you can just log on and talk to your friends or other player in the server, and there is also shader just in case you want to change how the game looks.

The ip is killercodessmp.falixsrv.me

if the server is off then please start it up with https://falixnodes.net/startserver?ip=killercodessmp.falixsrv.me

Be warned this is a 4 gb server and the rules will be posted in the discord server 

Discord:https://discord.gg/h7QDuSmaH6
